FRONTIER-HEAT.title: Heat
FRONTIER-HEAT.description: If Heat is 70 or higher, add 1 [gold]Burn[/gold] to your discard at end of turn. If Heat is 200 or higher, gain 1 Body Burn per 100 Heat at end of turn.
FRONTIER-BODYBURN.title: Body Burn
FRONTIER-BODYBURN.description: Whenever you play a card, take damage equal to Body Burn. At end of turn, lose 1.
FRONTIER-REFORGE.title: Reforge
FRONTIER-REFORGE.description: A unique upgrade limit that increases this card's maximum upgrade count.
FRONTIER-MASTERPIECE.title: Masterpiece
FRONTIER-MASTERPIECE.description: Raises this card's maximum upgrade cap. When upgrade level reaches the masterpiece threshold, the card transforms into another card (Anvil Echo becomes Anvil Memory at +10).
FRONTIER-ENCHANT.title: Enchant
FRONTIER-ENCHANT.description: A special enhancement applied to cards after combat.
